description: Show translatable offer template. Endpoint: GET /c/{company_id}/offer_templates/{offer_template_id}/translate. Required parameters: offer_template_id, company_id. Optional parameters include target_lang_code.

params.name: target_lang_code
params.description: Target language code - if provided only fields without translation will be returned

example_request:
GET /c/{company_id}/offer_templates/{offer_template_id}/translate

Required params: offer_template_id, company_id

Optional params: target_lang_code
